dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.spendingByCategoryDescription: Visual representation of your expenses across different categories.
dashboard.noExpenseData: No expense data available to display chart.

settingsPage.title: Settings
settingsPage.transactionsPerPageDescription: Number of transactions to display on the transactions page.
settingsPage.dashboardSettingsDescription: Choose which cards to display on your dashboard.
settingsPage.showTotalBalanceCardDescription: Show the card displaying your total balance.
settingsPage.showMonthlyIncomeCardDescription: Show the card displaying your total monthly income.
settingsPage.showMonthlyExpensesCardDescription: Show the card displaying your total monthly expenses.
settingsPage.showAverageSpendingCardDescription: Show the card displaying average daily, weekly, and monthly spending.
settingsPage.showExpenseChartCardDescription: Show the chart visualizing spending by category.
settingsPage.showRecentActivityCardDescription: Show the list of recent transactions.
settingsPage.geminiApiKeyPlaceholder: Enter your Google AI Gemini API Key
settingsPage.geminiApiKeyDescription: Your API key for accessing Gemini models. This key is stored locally and used for AI features.
settingsPage.successToastDescription: Your settings have been successfully saved.
settingsPage.errorToastDescription: Could not save your settings. Please try again.

profilePage.title: User Profile
profilePage.description: View and update your profile information.
profilePage.successToastDescription: Your profile has been successfully updated.
profilePage.errorToastDescription: Could not update your profile. Please try again.
profilePage.successPasswordToastDescription: Your password has been successfully changed.

budgetsPage.title: Budgets
budgetsPage.description: Manage your monthly budgets for different categories.
budgetsPage.newBudgetDescription: Set a planned amount for a category for a specific month and year.
budgetsPage.editBudgetDescription: Update the details for your budget.
budgetsPage.successCreateToastDescription: Budget for {categoryName} in {monthYear} has been successfully created.
budgetsPage.successUpdateToastDescription: Budget for {categoryName} in {monthYear} has been successfully updated.
budgetsPage.noBudgets: No budgets found for the selected period.
budgetsPage.confirmDeleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete the budget for {categoryName} for {monthYear}?

capitalPage.title: Capital
capitalPage.description: Manage and share your capital overview.
capitalPage.startShareSuccessDescription: You are now sharing your capital with {email}.
capitalPage.stopShareSuccessDescription: You have stopped sharing your capital.
capitalPage.noWallets: No wallets found. Add a wallet to see your capital.

feedbackPage.title: Submit Feedback
feedbackPage.description: Help us improve! Share your thoughts, report issues, or suggest new features.
feedbackPage.subjectPlaceholder: e.g., Problem with login, Idea for new chart
feedbackPage.messagePlaceholder: Please provide as much detail as possible...
feedbackPage.errorToastDescription: Could not submit your feedback: {error}. Please try again.

aiReportsPage.title: AI Financial Reports
aiReportsPage.description: Generate and view AI-powered financial insights.
aiReportsPage.noReport: No report generated yet. Click the button above to generate one.

transactionsPage.title: Transactions
transactionsPage.stopRecurringSuccessDescription: The transaction will no longer recur.
transactionsPage.noRecurringTransactionsDescription: Transactions set to daily, weekly, monthly, or yearly will appear here.
transactionsPage.noTransactionsDescription: Try adjusting your filters or adding new transactions.

examplePage.title: Example Page
examplePage.description: This is a sample page added to the application.
